title: callicarpa prolifera var. prolifera
intro: Callicarpa prolifera var. prolifera is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, also known as the purple callicarpa or purple leafed lantana. It is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands, recognized for its vibrant purple flowers and berries. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and combating infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of Callicarpa prolifera var. prolifera are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects.
